name: COMPAGNIE REGIONALE D'ALIMENTS (COREAL)
message: Operating in the livestock (poultry, pig and ruminant) business since 1947, our family business is committed to continuing and sustaining its development as an independent and innovative challenger to serve the entrepreneurial farmers of tomorrow and to serve responsible and competitive sectors.https://www.michel-nutrition.fr/frGroup Michel / JYM Nutrition6 parc de Brocéliande - 35760 SAINT GRÉGOIRETel : 02 23 25 09 71 - Fax : 02 23 25 21 52 - societe@jym-nutrition.fr
